Player Ship Profile

EnginePlayer Proton

Base shield regen4
Base armor3

Is delivered with a good engine and a basic shield and armor.

A 360 degree particle gun that fires accelerated neutrons.

Ship Stats

Shield840
Regen40
Armor6
Radius15

Player accessBuyable ship
Known hangars12

Default Weapons

WeaponStart levelSlotType
Blaster01smartGun
Particle Gun02smartGun

Default Upgrades

TechStart levelWhat it gives
Armor1Increases health and armor amount. Armor reduces damage by its value per hit. - Can restore health. - armor bonuses scale with player level. Good vs fast hitting weapons.
Shield1Increases shield amount and regeneration rate. - Can block heavy hits. - Shield Bonuses scale with player level. Good vs hard hitting weapons.
Engine3Increases acceleration and speed. - Can boost speed. Good in PvP.
Power0Increases power regeneration and maximum power. - Can boost damage output at the cost of power. Good for dealing more damage for longer periods.

Ship Specialties

TraitBonus
Flat kinetic damage50
Speed20%
Kinetic damage20%
Corrosive damage20%
Flat corrosive damage50
